_instructions.description: This file contains your structured answers to the investigation questions. Fill in each field based only on evidence from the case.
rules: All answers must be derived directly from provided artifacts.
Do not guess or approximate answers.
Timestamps must follow the format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.
Use the correct timezone as specified in the case materials.
Artifact sources should clearly identify where the evidence was found.
Artifact paths should match the exact path or filename when applicable.
If multiple values are required, use a JSON array.
Do not modify the structure of this file.

field_explanations.case_id: Unique identifier for the case (provided in README).
field_explanations.platform: Operating system of the case (e.g., macOS, Windows).
field_explanations.timezone_used: Timezone used for all timestamps in this file.

answers.question: The investigation question being answered.
answers.artifact_source: The artifact used to support the answer (e.g., Safari History, Event Logs).
answers.notes: Optional short explanation of how the answer was derived.

final_assessment.summary: Short summary of what occurred in the incident.
final_assessment.confidence_level: Your confidence in your findings (e.g., High, Medium, Low).
final_assessment.limitations: Any uncertainty or missing data that affected your analysis.
